decision_summary.unresolved_ambiguity_note: The task packet provides normalized_threshold_score but not an observed_risk_score construction, so the deliverables use a documented packet-only equal-weight normalized deficit model and mark this as needs_review.

deliverables.description: Row-level ATAC-seq reproducibility QC calculations with source citations, risk contributions, margins, classifications, sensitivity results, and selected remediation fields.
Concise signoff memo documenting assumptions, formulas, acceptance criteria, final decision table, remediation cost checks, sensitivity notes, and validation checks.
Executable standard-library generator that reproduces the TSV and memo from the embedded packet.
